name: Mexican Chicken Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Red Bell Pepper - finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients except avocado, lettuce, and paprika.
2. Mix well until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
3. Cover the bowl and refrigerate for 30 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
4. Serve on lettuce leaves with avocado wedges.
5. Sprinkle with paprika before serving.
